title: sqlite-graphrag migrate --to-llm-only response
description: JSON contract for the `migrate --to-llm-only --drop-vec-tables --json` subcommand added in v1.0.76. The one-shot upgrade for v1.0.74 / v1.0.75 databases: rehash + apply V013 + report vec-table state. Requires --drop-vec-tables as an explicit safety guard.

rewritten.description: Number of migration rows whose checksum was rewritten by the rehash step.

v013_applied.description: True when migration V013 was applied during this invocation. False when the schema was already at or beyond V013.

schema_version.description: Current schema_version after the operation. Null when the database is uninitialized.

vec_tables_were_present.description: True when vec_memories, vec_entities, or vec_chunks virtual tables were detected in sqlite_master before the drop.

vec_tables_dropped.description: Names of the vec tables that were actually dropped. Empty when the tables were not present or the user declined --drop-vec-tables.

embedding_tables_created.description: Names of the BLOB-backed embedding tables created by V013. Empty when V013 was a no-op.
